mapper.sql: select gz.id, gz.order_no, gz.suppler_id, gz.order_date, gz.warehouse_id, gz.department_id, gz.apply_department_id, gz.order_status, gz.order_type, gz.del_flag, gz.audit_date, gz.is_follow_flag, gz.create_by, gz.create_time, gz.update_by, gz.update_time, gz.remark, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, d.id dId,d.code departmentCode,d.name departmentName, ad.id adId,ad.code adCode,ad.name adName, gz.tenant_id from gz_order gz left join fd_supplier s on gz.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_warehouse w on gz.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on gz.department_id = d.id left join fd_department ad on gz.apply_department_id = ad.id
mapper.select:
select gz.id, gz.order_no, gz.suppler_id, gz.order_date, gz.warehouse_id, gz.department_id, gz.apply_department_id, gz.order_status, gz.order_type, gz.del_flag, gz.audit_date, gz.is_follow_flag, gz.create_by, gz.create_time, gz.update_by, gz.update_time, gz.remark, gz.tenant_id, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, d.id dId,d.code departmentCode,d.name departmentName, ad.id adId,ad.code adCode,ad.name adName, COALESCE(SUM(gze.amt), 0) as totalAmt from gz_order gz left join fd_supplier s on gz.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_warehouse w on gz.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on gz.department_id = d.id left join fd_department ad on gz.apply_department_id = ad.id left join gz_order_entry gze on gze.paren_id = gz.id and gze.del_flag != 1 where gz.del_flag != 1 and gz.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and gz.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%') and gz.suppler_id = #{supplerId} and gz.order_date = #{orderDate} and gz.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and gz.order_status = #{orderStatus} and gz.order_type = #{orderType} and gz.audit_date = #{auditDate}
and gz.audit_date >= STR_TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') and gz.audit_date <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
and gz.create_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') and gz.create_time <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
group by gz.id, gz.order_no, gz.suppler_id, gz.order_date, gz.warehouse_id, gz.department_id, gz.apply_department_id, gz.order_status, gz.order_type, gz.del_flag, gz.tenant_id, gz.audit_date, gz.is_follow_flag, gz.create_by, gz.create_time, gz.update_by, gz.update_time, gz.remark, s.id, s.code, s.name, w.id, w.code, w.name, d.id, d.code, d.name, ad.id, ad.code, ad.name order by case when gz.order_status = 2 then 1 else 0 end asc, case when gz.order_status = 2 then gz.audit_date else null end desc, case when gz.order_status = 2 then null else gz.create_time end desc, gz.id desc

select a.id, a.order_no, a.suppler_id, a.order_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.apply_department_id, a.order_status, a.order_type, a.del_flag, a.audit_date, a.is_follow_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.tenant_id, ad.id adId, ad.code adCode, ad.name adName, b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.del_flag as sub_del_flag, b.remark as sub_remark, b.master_barcode as sub_master_barcode, b.secondary_barcode as sub_secondary_barcode, b.supplier_id as sub_supplier_id, b.warehouse_id as sub_warehouse_id, b.bill_no as sub_bill_no from gz_order a left join fd_department ad on a.apply_department_id = ad.id left join gz_order_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id and b.del_flag != 1 where a.id = #{id} and a.del_flag != 1 and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_order
order_no, suppler_id, order_date, warehouse_id, department_id, apply_department_id, order_status, order_type, del_flag, tenant_id, audit_date, is_follow_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{orderNo}, #{supplerId}, #{orderDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{applyDepartmentId}, #{orderStatus}, #{orderType}, #{delFlag}, #{scopedTenantId}, #{auditDate}, #{isFollowFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete: update gz_order set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update gz_order_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_order_entry( paren_id, material_id, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, remark, master_barcode, secondary_barcode, supplier_id, warehouse_id, bill_no, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
( #{item.parenId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.amt}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchNumber}, #{item.beginTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.remark}, #{item.masterBarcode}, #{item.secondaryBarcode}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.billNo}, (select t.tenant_id from gz_order t where t.id = #{item.parenId} limit 1), #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.select: select max(order_no) from gz_order where order_no like concat(#{prefix},'%') and order_no like concat('%',#{date},'%') and del_flag != 1 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select distinct go.order_no from gz_order go inner join gz_order_entry goe on go.id = goe.paren_id inner join gz_depot_inventory gdi on goe.batch_no = gdi.batch_no where gdi.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and go.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and go.order_type = 102 and go.order_status = 1 and go.del_flag != 1 and goe.del_flag != 1 and gdi.del_flag != 1
